summary: Iteration 40: Tested About page dark theme redesign, Video Designer multi-room auto-expansion packages, Profile page, PUT /api/auth/profile endpoint, Navigation profile link, and Pricing section. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (11/11 pytest tests passed) ===
✅ About page loads with dark background (rgb(15, 25, 35) / #0F1923)
✅ All text readable - white/gray text on dark background (no white-on-white)
✅ Hero section: 'Защо създадохме TemaDom?' title visible
✅ Problems section: 'Проблемът, който решаваме' found with problem cards
✅ Solutions section: 'Нашето решение' found with solution cards
✅ Mission section: 'Нашата мисия' found with mission statement
✅ CTA buttons: Register and Calculator buttons present
✅ Package 1 (69 EUR): Starts with 1 room tab
✅ Package 2 (129 EUR): Clicking auto-creates 2 room tabs
✅ Package 3 (220 EUR): Clicking auto-creates 4 room tabs
✅ Add room button (+) visible when below max limit
✅ Switching back to 69 EUR reduces to 1 room tab
✅ Each room has: video upload, dimensions (W/L/H), room type, style dropdown, notes
✅ Auth gate shown for unauthenticated users
✅ Profile page loads for authenticated users
✅ Name input field in edit mode
✅ City input field in edit mode
✅ Website input field in edit mode
✅ Description input field in edit mode
✅ Desktop: Profile link visible in navigation for logged-in users
✅ Mobile: Profile link ('Профил') present in mobile menu
critical_code_review_comments: 1. About page - Dark theme (#0F1923), all sections visible, text readable
2. Video Designer - 129 EUR auto-creates 2 rooms, 220 EUR auto-creates 4 rooms
3. Profile page - View/Edit/Save functionality working correctly
4. PUT /api/auth/profile - Updates name, city, website, description
5. Navigation - Profile link for logged-in users (desktop and mobile)
6. Pricing section - 3 Video Designer packages (69/129/220 EUR)
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test account profile@temadom.bg
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 tested new features: About page dark theme redesign, Video Designer multi-room auto-expansion (pkg-2 creates 2 rooms, pkg-3 creates 4 rooms), Profile page with view/edit/save, PUT /api/auth/profile endpoint. All working. Key test IDs: about-page, about-register-btn, about-calculator-btn, pkg-1/2/3, room-tab-{n}, add-room-btn, profile-page, profile-name, edit-profile-btn, save-profile-btn, profile-input-name/city/website/desc, logout-btn, nav-profile, pricing-section, pricing-card-0/1/2.

about_page_dark_theme.details: Dark background #0F1923, white/gray text, all sections visible (problems, solutions, mission)

video_designer_129eur_auto_expand.details: Clicking 129 EUR package auto-creates 2 room tabs

video_designer_220eur_auto_expand.details: Clicking 220 EUR package auto-creates 4 room tabs

video_designer_69eur_reduces.details: Switching back to 69 EUR reduces to 1 room tab

video_designer_room_fields.details: Each room has video upload, dimensions (W/L/H), room type, style dropdown, notes

profile_page_view.details: Profile page shows user info for authenticated users

profile_page_edit.details: Edit mode shows name, city, website, description inputs

profile_page_auth_gate.details: Auth gate shown for unauthenticated users on /profile

backend_put_auth_profile.details: PUT /api/auth/profile updates name, city, website, description correctly

navigation_profile_desktop.details: Profile link visible in desktop navigation for logged-in users

navigation_profile_mobile.details: Profile link present in mobile menu for logged-in users
